_textureforge.name: TextureForge V2 SDXL Reference Img2Img
_textureforge.purpose: Generate one WWE2K26-style texture source image from a reference image and a region prompt.
notes: This is vanilla ComfyUI API-format JSON using core nodes only.
Replace __CHECKPOINT__ with an installed SDXL/realistic checkpoint filename from your ComfyUI models/checkpoints folder.
Replace __REFERENCE_IMAGE__ with an uploaded ComfyUI input image filename.
TextureForge should generate one workflow copy per region, then import the output folder back for matching and validation.

recommended_model_slots.checkpoint: A realistic SDXL checkpoint installed locally. Do not hard-code until Rob's model inventory is known.
recommended_model_slots.vae: Use checkpoint VAE first; dedicated SDXL VAE optional.
optional_loras: skin/detail LoRA only if licensed and installed
fabric/gear LoRA only if licensed and installed
optional_future_nodes: IP-Adapter or PuLID/InstantID for stronger likeness guidance
ControlNet if pose/edge preservation is needed
